allow: PowerShell(Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem | Where-Object { $_.Used -ne $null } | Select-Object Name, @{N='Total\(GB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB + $_.Free/1GB, 0\)}}, @{N='Free\(GB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB, 0\)}}, Root | Sort-Object 'Free\(GB\)' -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)
